title: 1.1: Tests that keyBy returns an object keyed by iteratee result when a custom function is passed as iteratee
1.2: Tests that keyBy returns an object keyed by property name when a string is passed as iteratee
1.3: Tests that keyBy returns own properties when keys match inherited property names like constructor and hasOwnProperty
1.4: Tests that keyBy returns an object keyed by numeric index when a number is passed as iteratee for arrays of arrays
1.5: Tests that keyBy returns an object keyed by iteratee result when an object is passed as collection instead of an array
2.1: Places the test for custom iteratee function in packages/js-utils/src/test/
2.2: Places the test for property shorthand in packages/js-utils/src/test/
2.3: Places the test for inherited properties in packages/js-utils/src/test/
2.4: Places the test for numeric index iteratee in packages/js-utils/src/test/
2.5: Places the test for object collection in packages/js-utils/src/test/
3.1: All tests use Jest framework with describe blocks and it/test functions
3.2: All test descriptions clearly describe the expected behavior being tested
4.1: Uses shared test fixtures at describe block level when data is reused across multiple tests
